families.name: Phi-4
families.disclaimer: The catalog entries are Phi-4-style research micro-models, not official checkpoints.

families.name: Llama 3.1-8B-style
families.disclaimer: Architecture-inspired research micro-model; not an official Meta Llama checkpoint and not a claim about Llama 3.1 training efficiency.

families.name: Qwen2.5-7B-style
families.disclaimer: Architecture-inspired research micro-model; not an official Qwen checkpoint and not a claim about Qwen2.5 training efficiency.

families.name: Gemma 2-2B-style
families.disclaimer: Architecture-inspired research micro-model; not an official Google Gemma checkpoint and not a claim about Gemma 2 training efficiency.

families.name: Mistral 7B-v0.1-style
families.disclaimer: Architecture-inspired research micro-model; not an official Mistral AI checkpoint and not a claim about Mistral 7B training efficiency.

families.name: DeepSeek-V3-main-style
families.disclaimer: Architecture-inspired research micro-model; not an official DeepSeek checkpoint and not a claim about DeepSeek-V3 training efficiency.

corpora.label: Original study mixed corpus
corpora.split_method: Sorted file concatenation followed by a 98/2 tail split
corpora.license_note: The checked-in source files are content-hashed, but the original study did not record immutable upstream revisions or complete redistribution metadata.
corpora.limitations: This is not a balanced mixture. Training is approximately 9.55% Shakespeare and 90.45% WikiText by byte token; validation is entirely the tail of the WikiText source. Existing claims must not be relabeled as encyclopedic-only or balanced-mixed evidence.

corpora.label: Encyclopedic English
corpora.license_note: Wikipedia-derived text; preserve the pinned dataset card's attribution and share-alike metadata in the materialized manifest.
corpora.limitations: Measured evidence currently covers the Phi-4-style target B and layernorm.weight × 1.9 only; it is not a blanket claim for other genes, model families, or encyclopedia datasets.

corpora.label: English news
corpora.license_note: The MOT collection is CC BY 4.0 and its Voice of America source material is public domain; attribution and exact asset hashes must be retained in the materialized manifest.
corpora.limitations: This news slice is VOA-derived English and should not be generalized to every newsroom or language; measured evidence currently covers only the Phi-4-style target B and layernorm.weight × 1.9.

corpora.label: Balanced encyclopedia + news
corpora.split_method: Deterministic 4096-token block interleave, exactly 50/50 in train and validation
corpora.license_note: Retains the attribution and license metadata of both component corpora.
corpora.limitations: Balanced refers only to the two named domains. It is not a claim of broad real-world corpus representativeness; measured evidence currently covers only the Phi-4-style target B and layernorm.weight × 1.9.

corpora.label: WikiText-103 + VOA News · 75,497,473-token contiguous prefix
corpora.limitations: The pinned balanced-mix prefix supports native source validation, unchanged same-lineage sibling evaluation, and one-generation sibling selection. Cross-corpus replication remains untested.

architecture_contract.attention: MLA with q-rank 32, KV-rank 16, 16 non-positional QK dims, 8 RoPE dims, and 16 value dims

fragments.name: Current native screen · RMSNorm scale 1.758533
fragments.summary: Independently discovered from empty DNA on a 7,700,256-parameter Phi-4-style proxy using one contiguous 75,497,473-token balanced-mix prefix. Stage A screened 32 candidates, Stage B reranked six, and five held-out source-model pairs completed validation.
fragments.headline_label: fewer mean training tokens to frozen PPL ≤ 3.514751 · balanced mix
fragments.secondary_metric: Sibling unchanged vs empty: 13.86% (passed) · selected recipe vs empty: 16.93% (passed) · incremental vs inherited: 5.57% (did not pass)
fragments.status_reason: Native source discovery remains verified. On the same-corpus sibling, the unchanged parent produced a 13.86% ratio-of-means gain and passed the frozen 10% gate; the one-generation selected recipe produced 16.93% and passed its fresh-empty gate; the selected mutation produced 5.57% over the inherited recipe and did not pass its incremental gate.
fragments.limitations: Sibling transfer and selection were evaluated only on the same pinned balanced-mix prefix and training recipe; cross-corpus replication remains untested. The selected mutation uses an inherited baseline and therefore remains catalog-experimental regardless of its research gate (did not pass).

passport.Stage A: Complete — 32 candidates · 1 search seed · 512 steps · top 6 advanced
passport.Stage B: Complete — 6 candidates · 2 fresh search seeds · 1,536 steps · 1 winner
passport.Source-model validation: Complete — 5 fresh paired seeds · 4,608 steps · 5/5 positive
passport.Current boundary: Same-lineage evaluation and one-generation selection complete
passport.Next validation: Cross-corpus replication of the unchanged parent and selected one-generation recipe
passport.Limitations: Same-corpus sibling evidence only; cross-corpus replication is untested. Transfer gate passed, selected-recipe gate passed, incremental 10% gate did not pass.

fragments.name: layernorm.weight scale 1.9
fragments.status_reason: Fresh width-scaling evidence is the primary 3×3 matrix; the earlier V2 same-width cohort remains nested as an independent secondary replication.

width_scaling_evidence.statistical_note: The 1/16 unanimous-sign reference requires independent fair seed signs; exchangeability alone is insufficient. It is not used as an inferential p-value.
width_scaling_evidence.inference_scope: descriptive fixed-recipe parameter-count trend over 889,440, 3,456,192, and 7,700,256 parameters; not a general model-size scaling law

trend.method: equal corpus mean within seed, then three-point OLS slope
trend.scope: descriptive fixed-recipe width trend; not a scaling law

claim.title: LayerNorm ×1.9 initialization convergence on encyclopedic english
LayerNorm ×1.9 initialization convergence on english news
LayerNorm ×1.9 initialization convergence on balanced encyclopedia + news

joint_scaling_evidence.inference_scope: descriptive one-pass joint model-and-independent-corpus scaling over 889,440 parameters with 8,388,609 corpus tokens, 3,456,192 parameters with 33,554,433 corpus tokens, and 7,700,256 parameters with 75,497,473 corpus tokens; model-size and data-size effects are not separable

trend.method: equal corpus mean within seed, then three-point OLS slope
trend.scope: descriptive joint model-and-corpus trend; effects are not separable

fragments.name: Sibling-selected one-generation mutation
fragments.summary: The selected mutation was evaluated on top of the inherited native recipe. Its held-out ratio-of-means gain was 5.57% and the frozen 10% research gate did not pass.
fragments.secondary_metric: Selected vs inherited: 5.57% · 10% research gate did not pass
fragments.status_reason: The selected mutation was positive on the inherited baseline but did not pass the frozen 10% incremental research gate; inherited-baseline evidence is catalog-experimental.
fragments.limitations: The 5.57% value is a threshold-crossing speed gain, not a final-PPL reduction. At the last checkpoint the selected/parent geometric-mean PPL ratio was 0.995634 (0.44% lower); the incremental 10% gate did not pass, and a mutation-only arm was not run.

recipes.name: Native sibling one-generation selected recipe
recipes.summary: The one-generation selected two-gene recipe was evaluated against fresh empty on the sibling. Its ratio-of-means gain was 16.93% and the frozen 10% recipe gate passed; the selected mutation's incremental gain over the inherited recipe was 5.57% and its 10% gate did not pass.
recipes.secondary_metric: Selected recipe vs empty: 16.93% · incremental vs inherited: 5.57% · evolution gate did not pass
recipes.status_reason: The complete selected recipe passed the fresh-empty 10% gate, but the added mutation did not pass the frozen 10% incremental gate over the inherited recipe.
recipes.limitations: The 5.57% value is a threshold-crossing speed gain, not a final-PPL reduction. At the last checkpoint the selected/parent geometric-mean PPL ratio was 0.995634 (0.44% lower); the incremental 10% gate did not pass, and a mutation-only arm was not run.
